steps.title: Spot the key signal
steps.content: The passage says the minaret is “almost always included” in mosque designs and is among the “standard features.” This signals we need a word for something typical and characteristic.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content: A hallmark is a distinctive mark or characteristic feature of something. The other three don't fit: rejection means refusal, motivation means a reason, and duplicate means a copy. That matches choice A — A is correct.
